'''Kova Naan''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Lannik (species)/Legends|Lannik]] who was a member of the [[New Osler Flejj Beasts]], a [[Pugil]] team on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Lannik/Legends|Lannik]]. His teammate, [[Rolsat Noviee]] was exposed as a [[Clawdite/Legends|Clawdite]] changeling [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. Afterwards, Naan quipped even his reporter could be Noviee in disguise.
